feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to edit ABAP Language version of a database table in eclipse ADT.
entry.content:
Hello All,

we have created a new database table and saved in a package for which the "The Default ABAP Language Version" is set to ABAP for Cloud Development, but the software component is updated to HOME (Standard ABAP). Later we have updated the software component the package to "ABAP for Cloud". Now we wanted to change the ABAP language version of the table that was already created to ABAP for Cloud development from Standard ABAP. But the field is not input enabled in eclipse ADT.

How can we update this? If this is not possible to update, do we get any issues if we keep this ABAP Language Version to Standard ABAP in TIER1 Package.

 

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi

entry.title: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content:
I have a class in which I have defined various Text elements.
For eg.
H01=Title1
H02=Title2
H03=Title3
H04=Title4
etc.
I am trying to print all the titles in my class. I have a loop in my class and I am building the text element name dynamically.

lv_title = `TEXT-H` && conv ty_n2( sy-tabix ).

Now, I use this variable to dynamically access the text element in the program

assign (lv_title) to <title>.

Class is syntactically correct and executes fine with expected results.

But, I get a warning saying: "The old variant of "<dynamic-object>" should not be used in the current ABAP language version."

If this is considered the "old" variant, what is the equivalent "new" variant to access variables by name?

I am on ABAP Cloud version, so that limits the commands available to me (for eg. READ TEXTPOOL isn't available to me)

entry.title: Hi Experts i am trying to manipulate shelf life expiration date from badi VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
But when i am putting debugged IF_EX_VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT~MAINTAIN_SLED_PARAMETERS but its not triggering from MSC1/2/3n or from migo and when i do a where used list on VB_SLED_MANAGEMENT i am not getting any result in hana system. Can someone please help me to understand how to trigger debugging for this it will be of great help.

As i see this badi is there in the official sap help document for sled determnation for batch.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud get SSL Handshake error while calling API
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Environment: SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2502

I call an API by postman with get method success,

https://cpx.cbc.gov.tw/API/DataAPI/Get?FileName=BP01D01

 

but get exception while using abap code in s/4hana cloud as below

--> SSL handshake with cpx.cbc.gov.tw:443 failed after 421

 

 METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.

    " Create HTTP client; send request
    TRY.
        DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url(
            'https://cpx.cbc.gov.tw/API/DataAPI/Get' ).

        DATA(lo_http_client) = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( i_destination = lo_destination ).
        DATA(lo_request) = lo_http_client->get_http_request( ).

        lo_request->set_query( query = 'FileName=BP01D01' ).

        DATA(lo_response) = lo_http_client->execute( i_method = if_web_http_client=>get ).
        DATA(lv_json_results) = lo_response->get_text( ).

      CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lx_exception).
        out->write( lx_exception->get_text( ) ).
    ENDTRY.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

How can I do to solve this issue.

entry.title: Which function call returns 0? in sap abap
entry.content: Which function call returns 0? in sap abap

entry.title: sap BTP BUILD Apps no authorization for ABAP System
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

In BTP cloud i have created destination for ABAP and connection is success and reachable .

The issue is from BUILD App , when trying to access the ABAP system via the destination created in BTP Cockpit we are getting below error .

Error message :  "You don't have permission to access this system. Choose another system or reach out to your admin."

Please suggest solution . 

 

Error Image:

Destination Detail

entry.title: What is IDOC Pointer in SAP?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Could you please help me to understand Pointer concept in SAP?

 

With Regards,

Neel

entry.title: Issue with Query Returning Incorrect Data from MARM Table
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an issue with a query that is supposed to retrieve data from the MARM table, specifically the UMREN field. However, the query consistently returns the value 10, which is incorrect. Below is the code I am using:

DATA: lv_umren_ea TYPE P.
CLEAR lv_umren_ea.
SELECT SINGLE MARM~UMREN
INTO lv_umren_ea
FROM MARM
JOIN MARC ON MARM~MATNR = MARC~MATNR
JOIN CAUFV ON MARC~WERKS = CAUFV~WERKS
  WHERE MARM~MEINH = 'EA'.
Z_EA = lv_umren_ea.

Could anyone help me identify what might be wrong with this code? Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Program to modify for avoid planned GI date update in Transportation Planning with TM
entry.content:
Hello

 

Please which program do i update to change the behavior of planned GI date update in SAP S/4HANA. Because I use this date for pricing at the order level and do not want it to be updated. How can I change this?

entry.title: Custom Flexible Workflow for Reservation in S/4 Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there a way to create a custom flexible workflow for Reservation (Procurement) in S/4 Public Cloud?
If not for Reservation, is there an alternative way to create a custom workflow?

Thanks in advance.
Regards,
Shankar

entry.title: Custom Code Migration (BTP): Object Navigation missing
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using the Custom Code Migration App in the BTP. In the list of findings the objects are named but they are all disabled for navigation (greyed out) and therefore it's not possible to find the specific code segment in these objects that need to be adjusted. This is case for every finding.

 

Any information on why the navigation is disabled or how to alternatively find the affected code segments would be greatly appreciated.

Best Regards

entry.title: How to add a field documentation in a custom analytical query
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to add in some field documentation into a custom analytical query report but failing to find any documentation on how to do this. Please see image below which shows what happens when I right-click => More field help. 

This is powered by a custom CDS view and please see the reference below for the field and annotations.

The label annotation is working but the quick info is not at the moment.

 

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

@EndUserText.label: 'Not Invoiced Amount'

@EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Quick Info'

NetUnitPrice * (cast(RequestedQuantity as abap.int8) - cast((case when _ItemQtys.InvoicedQty is null then 0 else _ItemQtys.InvoicedQty end) as abap.int8)) as NotInvoicedAmount,

entry.title: Create and update action in custom table while implementing cloud BADI in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I have implementing a cloud BADI badi_mmim_check_matdocitem in S4 Hana public cloud system using developer extensibility. Since this BADI do not have yeild quantity I have entered while cobnfirming the production order. I want to SAVE the data into custom table and fetch the data again to validate against the quantity.

My question is how should be update a custom table in cloud BADI. I am getting error as Executing "MODIFY <dbtab>" from "CHECK_ITEM" violates transactional contract "FUNCTIONAL".

entry.title: Fetch sales order Number and Line item displayed on a PPDS block
entry.content:
Hi All!

We have requirement where we need to change sales order status when we fix the block in PPDS. The issue I am facing is we don't know how to get Sales order No. and Item No. for a order displayed on "Detailed Schedule Planning Dashboard" (SAPAPO/CPDS0).

entry.title: PPF- Autopack
entry.content: I have a task which is, PPF: Pack for Inbound delivery, I have to create a custom action definition so as to implement the method for autopack. I have found a standard method for autopack, but I'm facing issue in implementing that in the action definition. Does anyone know how to implement it in the action definition?

entry.title: Deploy SAP Fiori App on S/4 HANA Public Cloud with SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

@julieplummer20 @ariannamussobarcucci 

I am facing a weird problem when trying to deploy SAP Fiori app through SAP business application studio on S/4 HANA public cloud development tenant (080).  I am following the below tutorial but getting the error on Step 5 during the deployment.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-s4hanacloud-procurement-purchasereq-shop-ui.html

I have developed RAP application in Eclipse IDE and have connected SAP BTP and S/4 HANA cloud application to deploy the application. App has built successfully but when trying to deploy same, getting the below error.

error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'bind').
Please help me to understand the error and the steps to resolve the same.

Thank you in advance!

Thanks.

entry.title: SUSG integration with ATC
entry.content:
Hello All - there are soo many tcodes/ tool within SAP for performing analysis of Sap ECC custom code to S4 Hana conversion , which one is most preferred one ?

custom code  -  Analyze the custom code to S4 using ATC - ? or other SAP Readiness check2.0  /SDF/? 

usage of custom code - SUSG , SCMON , UPL - ? other ?

are there any sap ecc related fiori app to merge information of custom code along with usage ? - like CCMC / CCLM in solution manager ?

 

thanks

entry.title: Choose the incorrect information about the exception hierarchy in ABAP.
entry.content:
In this question, I doesn't know the answer? Anyone help me?
(Choose 1 answer)
Choose the incorrect information about the exception hierarchy in ABAP.
A. Every exception class offers a range of standard methods and attributes are derived from the subclass CX_ROOT.
B. All exception classes must be derived from one of the classes CX_STATIC_CHECK,CX_DYNAMIC_CHECK or CX_NO_CHECK.
C. The classes CX_STATIC_CHECK, CX_DYNAMIC_CHECK, CX_NO_CHECK are subclasses of superclass CX_ROOT.
D. None of the others.

entry.title: Is it advisable to create all classic APIs for Tier 2 ABAP Cloud Development in single class?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to create multiple APIs for tier2 to consume the same in Tier1. Is it advisable to create all the wrapper objects in a single class as a separate method or should we go with individual wrapper class for each classic API?

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi

entry.title: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - Seeking Advice
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently pursuing my Master's in Information Systems and have about 5 years of experience as an ABAP Developer.

As I continue my academic journey, I'm looking to enhance my credentials with the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud  and SAP Fiori Application Developer certification. I'm specifically interested in:

  • Are there any special programs or discounts available for graduate students pursuing SAP certifications
  • Does SAP offer any university alliance programs that provide certification opportunities?
  • Has anyone here completed this certification while being a student? If so, what was your experience like?
  • Any recommendations on the best preparation resources for this certification that are budget-friendly for students?
  • Are there any mentorship programs available for students aiming to specialize in SAP development?

Additionally, if there are any specific grants, scholarships, or corporate sponsorship programs that support SAP certification for graduate students, I'd appreciate that information as well.

I believe this certification would strengthen my professional credentials and prior industry experience, making me more competitive in the job market as I advance my career in SAP development.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Best regards,
Kavyasri
